createdDateTime.description: Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)

glAccountID.description: Id of the general ledger account associated with this credit memo.

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the record.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)

leaseID.description: Id of the lease associated with this credit memo.

parentTxID.description: Id of the payment causing this prepay application.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with this credit memo.
